title: Persist Stitch exports and refresh design_package SoT
description: ui-generator-agent re-runs Stitch capture for project 3675777318594458616 per stitch_workflow (source_of_truth), persists versioned exports under design/stitch/screens/, design/stitch/code/, and a non-stub design/stitch/meta.json (schema_version 1, screens with repo-relative image and code paths), then updates tasks/app-ui-design-system/01-stitch-design-package/artifacts/design_package.json with stitch.source_of_truth, stitch.project_id, stitch.screen_ids (canonical baseline at index 0), stitch.export_paths that resolve on disk, acceptance.requires_stitch_fidelity_qa, and an explicit written acceptance.fidelity_tier structural matching repo policy (no tighter pixel parity unless EM records an escalation).
acceptance: design/stitch/meta.json exists, is non-stub, schema_version 1, and lists each screen with resolvable repo-relative paths for image under design/stitch/screens/ and code under design/stitch/code/ per .cursor/skills/design/stitch_workflow.skill.md.
Committed PNG (or agreed raster) exports exist under design/stitch/screens/ and code exports under design/stitch/code/ for the active canonical screen (stitch.screen_ids[0] after ids are finalized).

artifacts/design_package.json exists under tasks/app-ui-design-system/01-stitch-design-package/artifacts/ with kind design-package, schema_version 1, feature_slug app-ui-design-system, surface_id for the MVP primary surface, artifact_owner_task_slug 01-stitch-design-package.

design_package.json stitch.source_of_truth is true; stitch.project_id is 3675777318594458616; stitch.screen_ids lists the canonical screen id at index 0; stitch.export_paths documents meta, images_dir, and code_dir paths that resolve to the committed design/stitch/ files.

design_package.json acceptance.requires_stitch_fidelity_qa is true and acceptance documents explicit fidelity_tier structural (verbatim string usable by QA/EM; must match quality-gate acceptance mirror).
retry metadata per bounded Stitch attempt policy remains coherent (attempt, max_attempts, exit_reason, last_prompt_delta) if further MCP cycles occur.
status and references reflect readiness for 02-design-system-tokens; blockers[] lists any unresolved capture gaps.
